profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Century Textile Industry Tbk engages in the textile business in Indonesia, Saudi Arabia, other Asian countries, Bangladesh, the United Arab Emirates, other Middle East countries, Northern America, the Netherlands, Australia, Egypt, and other Euro-zone countries. The company provides spinning, weaving, and dyeing and finishing of clothes. It also offers tetoron cotton and chief value cotton plain, and dobby fabrics, as well as oxford fabrics for producing shirts and uniform. PT Century Textile Industry Tbk was founded in 1970 and is based in Jakarta Timur, Indonesia.
profil.berita_terkini: ⚠️ Laporan keuangan dalam USD, harga dalam IDR. Rasio (ROE/ROA/margin) tetap valid, tetapi valuasi per-saham (EPS/PER/PBV/DCF) tidak akurat tanpa konversi kurs.
